description_long: This is a modern LG microwave oven with a sleek, rectangular form and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a large, rectangular glass window set into the door, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber, and is flanked by a vertical control panel on the right side. The control panel includes a digital display, several touch-sensitive buttons, and a few labeled icons for various functions. The LG logo and additional branding are visible on the lower left of the door. The sides, top, and back are solid black with no visible vents or additional features. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or break rooms.
description: A sleek black LG microwave with a large front glass window, digital control panel, and minimalist design. The branding and controls are clearly visible on the front.
description_view_0: The left side of the microwave is visible, showing a plain, solid black surface with no features or openings.
description_view_1: The back of the microwave is shown, featuring a flat, unadorned black panel with no visible vents or markings.
description_view_2: The front view displays the glass window, LG branding, and a vertical control panel with a digital display and buttons on the right.
description_view_3: The right side of the microwave is visible, showing a plain, solid black surface similar to the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: The LG logo is present on the lower left corner of the front door, in white, small and clearly visible against the black background.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a series of touch-sensitive buttons and icons arranged in a column. The buttons are clearly labeled and separated for different functions.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the lower right edge of the door, forming a subtle horizontal groove that allows for easy gripping and pulling. It appears to be made of the same black plastic as the door frame.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any of the visible surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
